feature_name: make_timestamp(bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, double)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps(id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = make_timestamp(2023, 10, 6, 9, 15, 30.123456) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, extract(epoch from event_time) as epoch_time FROM timestamps;
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < make_timestamp(2020, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0.0);
